query: SELECT p.nome, p.ativo, COUNT(*) as total_afericoes FROM vendas v JOIN postos p ON v.postoId = p.id WHERE v.afericao = 1 GROUP BY p.nome, p.ativo
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 41wMkRgfnqozYTj.root --database GsoitYr3hHiyZTgQLwp9sV --execute SELECT p.nome, p.ativo, COUNT(*) as total_afericoes FROM vendas v JOIN postos p ON v.postoId = p.id WHERE v.afericao = 1 GROUP BY p.nome, p.ativo
